dialogos.texto_en: Phew, we swam quite a bit, didn't we?\nMaybe we went too hard on the first day.
But, when you see such a beautiful sea like this,\nyou can't help but forget about Fu-kun's slow pace.
We should think about pacing ourselves\nfrom here on out,\nor it'll be tough from tomorrow onwards.
That's true.\nThose two over there\ndon't seem to be bothered, though.
SPLASH! ROARRR!!
WAAAH! I'M GONNA GET EATENNN!
Oh, is that a game of shark attack?
Sharks don't say 'roar,' do they?
I'm a bit worried about Raiha-chan\ngetting tired, let's go check on her.
It's not just Raiha-chan\nthat I'm worried about, though.
That was fun!\nYotsuba-san, you swim really fast.
You were also really good at swimming,\nyou know, Raiha-chan? It was hard to catch you\nbecause you swam so quickly.
You two get along so well, as usual.\nWhat were you doing?
Playing shark attack!
You swim close to the other person underwater\nwithout being noticed, and then suddenly\npull them down under the water.
Oh? Nino, you were right.
Yotsuba's pretty easy to understand.
I got eaten seven times!
Well, Raiha-chan is just too cute,\nso I got really into attacking her.
Seven times? There has to be nothing left but bones.\nThe Yotsuba shark is merciless.
Have no fear!\nEven like this,\nRaiha-chan's cuteness will never be lost!
I'll come back to life as many times \nas I need to!
Raiha-chan, you seem really pumped,\nbut are you okay?\nYou seem a bit wobbly... Oh, watch out!
Ahaha! I fell!
Are you alright?!
I'm fine.
I think you need a break.\nWanna go see Futaro-kun?
No, I'm okay!\nI still wanna play more!
I admire your spirit!\nNext, let's compete in a water race!
Wooah!
Okay! I'll make the first move!
Counter-attack!
Both of you, make sure you're taking breaks.
Okay!
Huh?\nNino, is something wrong?
It's nothing.\nI'm going to head back.
Oh dear.\nI have a feeling that there's a storm brewing.
